query:
SELECT 
  contract_no, paid_at, amount, COUNT(*) AS cnt
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365'
  AND JSON_EXTRACT(raw_json, '$.source') IS NULL
  AND paid_at >= '2026-04-01'
  AND paid_at < '2026-05-01'
  AND external_id NOT LIKE 'pay-%'
GROUP BY contract_no, paid_at, amount
HAVING cnt > 1
ORDER BY cnt DESC
LIMIT 10
